headline: Dow Jones Futures: Stock Market Resilient As Oil Prices Spike, Tesla Slumps; Jobs Report On Tap
summary: The stock market rose strongly for the week, even with oil prices soaring. Investors should look for this signal. Tesla tumbled Thursday on weak deliveries.

headline: Why RWR’s 3.4% Yield Looks More Durable Than Most Investors Realize
summary: The SPDR Dow Jones REIT ETF (NYSEARCA:RWR) offers a 3.4% dividend yield backed by more than 100 publicly traded REITs, but the real question is whether that income holds up across rate cycles. How the Income Is Structured RWR tracks the Dow Jones U.S. Select REIT Index, owning shares in publicly traded REITs rather than ... Why RWR’s 3.4% Yield Looks More Durable Than Most Investors Realize

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Equinix (EQIX) After Strong Year To Date Gains?
summary: Wondering whether Equinix at around US$995.98 is offering fair value or asking too much of future expectations? This breakdown will help you frame the stock in numbers you can actually use. Over shorter periods the stock has recently shown returns of 3.1% over 7 days and 30.3% year to date, while the 1 year and 3 year returns sit at 22.6% and 50.7% respectively. The recent share price moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing interest in data centers and digital infrastructure companies, with...
